allow: Bash(curl -s "https://api.github.com/repos/Carl-Jaison/PGP/git/trees/main?recursive=1" | python -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(i['path']\) for i in data.get\('tree',[]\) if not i['path'].endswith\('.html'\) and not 'base64' in i.get\('path',''\)]")

Bash(powershell.exe -File - << 'PWSH' $file = 'C:/Users/Carl/Documents/PGP Website/PGP/index.html' $content = Get-Content $file -Raw $pattern = '\(?s\)\(
\\s*\)]*>\(.*?
Karthik\)' $replacement = '$1$2Karthik' $content = [regex]::Replace\($content, $pattern, $replacement, [System.Text.RegularExpressions.RegexOptions]::Singleline\) [System.IO.File]::WriteAllText\($file, $content, [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8\) Write-Host "Done" PWSH)

Bash(powershell.exe -File - << 'PWSH' $file = 'C:/Users/Carl/Documents/PGP Website/PGP/index.html' $content = Get-Content $file -Raw # Fix Narayan - add object-position:center to img just before his faculty-info $content = [regex]::Replace\($content, '\(?s\)\(
\\s*Narayan\)', '$1 style="object-position:center;" $2$3Narayan', [System.Text.RegularExpressions.RegexOptions]::Singleline\) # Fix Shambhavi - same $content = [regex]::Replace\($content, '\(?s\)\(
\\s*Dr\\. Shambhavi\)', '$1 style="object-position:center;" $2$3Dr. Shambhavi', [System.Text.RegularExpressions.RegexOptions]::Singleline\) [System.IO.File]::WriteAllText\($file, $content, [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8\) Write-Host "Done" PWSH)
